calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Petitioners, Paula Velazquez and Joel Madrigal present in pro per and with the Spanish Interpreter, Maria Rodriquez. Parties were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the minor's name to: Joel Madrigal Velazquez.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-26-2003 Reset To Aug-28-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields
No appearances. The matter is continued to August 28, 2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218.
